Admins can read all account roles.name: Admins can read all account roles

Admins can read all accounts.name: Admins can read all accounts
Admins can read all accounts.using:
(EXISTS ( SELECT 1
   FROM (account_roles ar
     JOIN roles r ON ((r.id = ar.role_id)))
  WHERE ((ar.account_id = auth.uid()) AND (ar.role_id = ANY (ARRAY['super-admin'::text, 'admin'::text])))))

Admins can read logs.name: Admins can read logs
Admins can read logs.using:
(EXISTS ( SELECT 1
   FROM account_roles ar
  WHERE ((ar.account_id = auth.uid()) AND (ar.role_id = ANY (ARRAY['super-admin'::text, 'admin'::text])))))
